cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Duel Gear
1 1 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Duel Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature has first strike. (That creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.) Equip {1}
Phantom Gear
1 1 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Phantom Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Whenever equipped creature attacks, generate one treasure token. (It’s an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”) Equip {1}
Nimble Gear
1 1 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Nimble Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature has flying. (That creature can’t be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.) Equip {1}
Ominous Gear
3 3 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Ominous Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has reach. (That creature can block creatures with flying.) Equip {1}
Prestige Gear
2 2 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Prestige Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature gets +3/+0. Equip {1}
Omega Gear
4 4 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Omega Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature gets +2/+2. Whenever equipped creature attacks, generate one treasure token. (It’s an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”) Equip {2}
Hazard Gear
4 4 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Hazard Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature has reach. Whenever equipped creature attacks, generate one treasure token. (It’s an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”) Equip {2}
Rage Gear
4 4 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Rage Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature has first strike and reach. (That creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike. That creature can block creatures with flying.) Equip {2}
Ultimate Gear
4 4 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Ultimate Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade-Wielder. Equipped creature gets +3/+0 and has first strike. Equip {2}
Pandora's Gear
M 5 5 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Pandora’s Gear is a Keyblade when equipped to a Keyblade Wielder. Equipped creature gets +4/+6 and has first strike and shroud. (That creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike. This permanent can’t be the target of spells or abilities.) Equipped creature takes double the damage from combat.
Equip {3}
Lunar Eclipse
W 4W 5 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1
Kingdom Key
W 1 1 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +2/+1. Equip {1}
Kingdom Key D
B 1B 2 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +1/+2. Whenever equipped creature attacks, you may search your library for a basic land card, add it to your hand, then shuffle. Equip {2}
Wayward Wind
W 1W 2 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets -1/+2. WWW: Transform Wayward Wind. Activate only as a sorcery. Equip {2}
transform front Lost Memory

0 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +3/+3 and has flying. (That creature can’t be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.) Equip 3
transform back Wayward Wind

1 Equipped creature gets +0/+3. UUU: Transform Rainfell. Activate only as a sorcery. Equip {3}
transform front Stormfall
Stormfall
0 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +1/+5 and has hexproof. Equip {4}
transform back Rainfell

G 1G 2 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +3/-1. GGG: Transform Earthshaker. Activate only as a sorcery. Equip {3}
transform front Ends of the Earth
Ends of the Earth
0 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +4/+2 and deals damage to creatures in the form of +0/-1 counters. Equip {4}
transform back Earthshaker (KH)
Chaos Ripper
BG 4B/G 5 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +7/-3. Whenever equipped creature attacks, discard 1 card. Equip {4}
Master's Defender
W 2W 3 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +2/+3. When equipped creature leaves the battlefield, equip Master’s Defender to target creature you control. Equip {3}
Destiny's Embrace
W 1W 2 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature has lifelink. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, scry 1. (To scry 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.) Equip {1}
Two Becomes One
WB 3W/B 4 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +2/+2. When equipped creature attacks, reveal the top card of your library. If it’s a enchantment saga aura add it to your hand. Otherwise, put it at the bottom of your library. Equip {2}
Oathkeeper
W 2W 3 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +1/+3. Equip {3}
Oblivion
B 2B 3 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +3/+1. At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you both own and control Oblivion and an artifact named Oathkeeper, exile them, then meld them into Oblivion&Oathkeeper. Equip {3}
Oblivion and Oathkeeper
WB
0 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +3/+3. Whenever equipped creature attacks, chose one — • You may remove a lore counter from target enchantment saga you control. • Search your library for an enchantment saga aura and reveal that card. Shuffle your library, then put the card on your hand. Equip {4}
War of the Keyblade
M CRGBUWW/U/B/R/G 7 Legendary Battle - Siege Battle
1 (As a Siege enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You and others can attack it. When it’s defeated, exile it, then cast it transformed.)
transform front X-Blade
X-Blade
M
0 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 You win the game.
transform back War of the Keyblade
Star Seeker
WU 1W/U 2 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Landfall — Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, add {C}. Equip {1}
Keyblade of People's Hearts
B 1B 2 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +2/-1 and has deathtouch. (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.) Equip {2}
Way to Dawn
WB 2W/B 3 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Discard a card, T: Chose one — • equipped creature has lifelink until end of turn. • equipped creature has deathtouch until end of turn. Equip 2
Ultima Weapon
5 5 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Equipped creature gets +7/+7, has indestructible and hexproof. Equip 7
Luxu
M 3 3 Legendary Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Whenever you deal combat damage to a player, look at that player’s hand. Then you may pay 3 and chose a card from that player’s hand. That player discards that card. Equip 3
No Name
U 3U 4 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 Whenever equipped creature attacks and isn’t blocked, players dealt damage this turn by the equipped creature put a random card from their hand to the top of their libraries. Equip 3
Void Gear
B 2B 3 Artifact - Equipment Keyblade Artifact
1 When equipped creature attacks, attacked player shuffles their library. Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has menace. Equip 2
Limit Boost
3 3 Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Limit Boost deals 1 damage to target creature, T: That creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Keychain
M 3 3 Enchantment - Aura Enchantment
1 Enchant Equipment When Keychain enters the battlefield, search your library for an Equipment card, put it in your graveyard, then shuffle. Enchanted Equipment has all abilities of all cards put in the graveyard with Keychain.
